title: marumia rhodocarpa var. subglabrata
intro: Marumia rhodocarpa var. subglabrata is a plant species that belongs to the Asteraceae family, commonly known as a wild shrub found in tropical Africa. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimalarial, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Marumia rhodocarpa var. subglabrata include its potential to treat fever, rheumatism, and malaria, as well as its use as an antiseptic and antimicrobial agent. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which are traditionally used by locals to promote overall health and well-being.
